draft.title: How to Use GitHub Copilot Prompts That Actually Work
draft.markdownBody:
## Intro: GitHub Copilot Prompts
GitHub Copilot prompts become far more reliable when you provide role, goal, and constraints before requesting output.

## Problem
As mentioned in the transcript, results improved when context and constraints were explicit.

## Solution for GitHub Copilot Prompts
Use role + goal + constraints + output format. Iterate quickly with short prompts.

## Examples
As mentioned in the transcript, one-shot prompts were generic while iterative prompts were practical.

## Conclusion
Use repeatable structure and validate outputs before execution.

## Intro: GitHub Copilot Prompts
GitHub Copilot prompts become far more reliable when you provide role, goal, and constraints before requesting output.

## Problem
As mentioned in the transcript, results improved when context and constraints were explicit.

## Solution for GitHub Copilot Prompts
Use role + goal + constraints + output format. Iterate quickly with short prompts.

## Examples
As mentioned in the transcript, one-shot prompts were generic while iterative prompts were practical.

## Conclusion
Use repeatable structure and validate outputs before execution.
